name: Brussel Sprouts and Chestnuts
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the Brussels sprouts: Blanch in boiling water for 5-10 minutes, then run cold water over them.
2. Prepare the chestnuts: Make an "X" on the top of each one with a sharp knife. Brush each chestnut with oil and bake at 400°F (200°C) for 20 minutes, or until tender. Shell the cooked chestnuts.
3. Mix the prepared Brussels sprouts, roasted chestnuts, rosemary, tarragon, and cumin in a bowl. Season with salt and pepper.
4. Add chicken broth to the mixture and stir well.
5. Transfer the mixture to a baking dish and bake at 350°F (175°C) for 20 minutes, or until heated through. The cooking time can be extended if desired.
6. In a separate saucepan, mix cornstarch with water to create a slurry. Cook over medium heat until thickened.
7. Pour the thickened sauce over the vegetables and stir to combine.
